title: backeria viminalis
intro: Backeria viminalis, also known as the Viminal or Elder tree, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the Adoxaceae family. The bark and leaves of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Backeria viminalis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Backeria viminalis is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and can also be used in the form of dried flowers, leaves, and bark for various medicinal purposes.
